headline: SERVING KANPUR
WITH PRIDE.
story: Baba Mart 3.0 is a legacy of trust in Daheli Sujanpur. What started as a small neighborhood initiative has grown into a modern mart at Anna Chauraha, dedicated to serving local families.
We don't believe in middle-men. We bridge the gap between fresh staples and your kitchen, ensuring that every product on our shelf is worthy of your home.
Our "3.0" vision combines old-school neighborhood trust with modern convenience. Whether you walk into our aisles or order on WhatsApp, you're dealing with local people who care.

footer.headline: Serving Every Kitchen in 5km Radius.
footer.description: We deliver to Daheli Sujanpur, Sujanpur Colony, and all nearby localities. If you're near Anna Chauraha, we're your mart.

privacy: At Baba Mart 3.0, we prioritize your privacy. When you order via WhatsApp or phone, we collect minimal data required to fulfill your delivery: your name, contact number, and delivery address.
We do not share your personal information with third-party marketers. Your data is strictly used for order processing and occasionally for updates regarding store offers if you have opted in.
Our website does not use tracking cookies. We believe in a transparent and simple retail experience.
terms: By using our service, you agree to provide accurate delivery information. We strive for delivery within 30-60 minutes, but timings may vary based on traffic and weather conditions in Kanpur.
Payment is typically collected upon delivery (Cash or UPI) unless otherwise specified. Please verify all items at the time of delivery.
Returns or exchanges are accepted for damaged or incorrect items within 2 hours of delivery if reported with the original packaging.
legal.commitment: Every product delivered is checked for freshness and quality. We adhere to local trade regulations and safety standards.
